sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Cibawk Mi Khat Damsak

verses.text: Sabbath ni khatin Farisi mi upa khat' inn-ah anne dingin Jesuh pai a, mite in amah encik uh hi
Tua laitakin a khut leh a khe a bawk mi khat Jesuh kiangah hong pai a
Jesuh in zong Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite kiangah, “Sabbath ni-in cina damsak ding i Thukham in hong hiam, khak hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Ahi zongin kuamah in dawngloin omcip uh hi. Jesuh in zong tua mipa samin a damsak khit ciangin a ciahsak hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note khatpeuh' tapa ahi a, na bawngtal uh ahi zongin tuikhuk thukpi sungah Sabbath ni-in kia leh, Sabbath ni hinapi-in kaikhia veve ding hilo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Ahi zongin kuamah in hih thu dawng theilo uh hi.
Tua annekna-ah a kisam mite pawlkhat, uliante' tutna ding munah a tutnopna uh a muh ciangin amaute kiangah thu khat gen a
“Mopawi khatpeuhah hong kisap ciangin uliante' tutna ding munah tu kei un. Tua pawi siim dingin a kisamte lakah note sangin a ulianzaw khat hong omkha thei ding a
innteekpa in note kiangah, ‘Hih lai-ah amah tusakzaw ni,’ hong ci ding hi. Tua ciangin minautangte' tutna munah maizumpi-in na tusuk ding uh hi

Note pen tua bangin a hong kisap ciangin minautangte' tutna munah na tuzaw un. Innteekpa hong pai-in, ‘Lawm aw, hih tutphah nuamah hong tuzaw in,’ hong ci ding hi. Tua bangin leengla dangte khempeuh lakah hong cih ciangin nang-a' dingin angtan'huai mahmah hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a kiliansakte khempeuh in niamkhiatna thuak ding uh a, a kiniamkhiatte khempeuh a lianin kibawl ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in a innteekpa kiangah, “Sun-an nekna-ah ahi a, nitak-an nekna-ah ahi zongin mi na sap ciangin, na lawmte ahi a, na sanggamte ahi a, na behte ahi a, mihau na vengte ahi zongin sam kei in. Amaute in zong anne ding mahin nang hong samkik ding uh a, hih bangin hong sapna hangin na anvakna thaman a ngahkik na hi ding hi
Tua bangin anvakna pawi na bawl ciangin mizawngte, khezawte, khebaite, leh mittawte sam in

Amaute in nang hong thukkik zolo ding uh ahih manin nang-a' dingin a lungdamhuai hong hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin mihoihte a thawhkik hun ciangin Pasian in nang tungah hong thukkik ding hi,” a ci hi.
An ne-a a tutpih mite khat in hih thu a zak ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “Pasian' Ukna sungah an ne-a a tu mite bangzahin mi hampha ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Khatvei mi khat in pawi lianpi khat bawlin mi tampi a sam hi
Annek ding hun ciangin a nasempa sawl a, ‘Tu-in na khempeuh a baihsa-in omkhin ahih manin hong paita un,’ ci-in a khohsa mite a samsak hi
Ahih hangin a khohsa mite in a pai theihlohna ding uh paulap zong ciat uh hi. A masa penpa in, ‘Lo khat ka lei a, ka va et ding kisam ahih manin kong pai thei kei ding hi,’ na ci hi
Adang khat in, ‘Bawngtal kap nga ka lei a, a va sin ding ka hih manin kong pai thei kei ding hi,’ na ci hi
Adang khat leuleu in, ‘Ka zi ding a kila khin phet ahih manin kong pai thei kei ding hi,’ na ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin a nasempa hong ciahin a topa kiangah hih thute hong zasak hi. Tua ciangin innteekpa a heh suak a, a nasempa kiangah, ‘Khuasung kongzing khempeuhah va pai in la, mizawng, khezaw, mittaw, leh khebai mite hong paipih in,’ ci-in a sawl leuleu hi
Tua khit a sawtloin a nasempa in, ‘Topa aw, na cih bangin ka sam khin a, ahi zongin omna ding mun omlai hi,’ a ci hi
Tua ciangin a topa in a nasempa kiangah, ‘Gamsung lamliante leh lamneute-ah va pai in la, ka inn-ah mi a dim theihna dingin mi khempeuh hong paipihmang khin in
Ke'n kong cihin-ah, ka sap masak mite khat beek in ka an ciamkha lo ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi.
Mi tampi tak in Jesuh hong zui uh a, Jesuh zong kihei-in amaute kiangah
“Kei kiangah a hong pai mite peuhmah in a nu leh a pa, a zi leh a ta, a sanggam numeite leh a sanggam pasalte, leh ama pumpi mahmah a nial ngam kei leh keima nungzui suak theilo ding hi
Ama singlamteh mah puatawmin ka nung hong zuilote, keima nungzui hi theilo hi
Mi khatpeuh in inn lianpi khat lamding a sawm leh, ka zo zo ding hiam cih a theihna dingin a bei dingzah tuat masa hi
Tua bangin tuat masa kei leh tua inn a khuampite a phuhkhit ciangin zawhlohpi-in khawl ding a, tua inn a kizolo a mu mite khempeuh in amah nuihsan ding uh hi
‘Hih mipa in inn lamding kipan napi-in zo zolo hi,’ ci ding uh hi
Galkap tul sawm a nei kumpi khat in galkap tul sawm nih tawh a hong kuan kumpi khat do dingin a kithawi leh, tua kumpipa a dozo ding mahin i hat takpi hiam ci-in ngaihsun masa ding hi
A zo zo ding ahih vet kei leh, tua kumpipa a hong tun' ma, a gamla-ah a om lai-in, ama kiangah kamtaite sawl ding a, kilemna ding thu gensak ding hi
Tua mah bangin mi khat in a neih khempeuh a piakkhiat ngam kei leh keima nungzui suak theilo ding hi.
“Ci hoih hi; ahi zongin a alna bei leh i al kiksak theihna ding lampi omlo hi
Lei hoihsakna dingin kizang theilo a, eklei dingin zong kibawl theilo ahih manin paihmawk a kul hi. Tua ahih manin zakna ding bil a neite in za ta un,” a ci hi.
